<insights>

- Isolated files — no import edges between 9 files, cohesion is unmeasurable (reported as 0)
- Houses cross-cutting concern files (tsconfig, vitest.config.ts, package.json) that anchor the entire monorepo build
- Documentation assets (ARCHITECTURE.md, WORKSPACE_DESIGN.md, README.md) and image files co-locate with build config, which is normal for a monorepo root
- Zero imports in or out reflect the correct role of this zone as an inert configuration root
- Zero cohesion and coupling are expected; root-level config and documentation files form a natural singleton zone with no import relationships.
- tsconfig.tsbuildinfo is a TypeScript incremental build artifact that is regenerated on every build — its presence in workspace-root suggests build outputs may not be fully gitignored, which can cause spurious diffs in version control and bloat repository size over time
- tsconfig.tsbuildinfo is a generated build artifact present in workspace-root — verify it is listed in .gitignore; if it is committed, remove it from source control and add the pattern to .gitignore to prevent build noise in diffs

</insights>
